notice: 1.3.6 fixes a 'sharing violation' that could stop you saving your Excel while SSI was open. The app now releases the workbook as soon as it finishes reading it.
notes: 1.3.6 - fixes a file-lock bug: after previewing or uploading, SSI kept your Excel workbook open, so Excel could fail to save with 'Your changes could not be saved ... because of a sharing violation.' SSI now releases the file immediately after reading (both the preview and the HAP-upload paths). Just click Update now.
